task_summary: Customer asks to exchange headphones for a phone case as if it were a variant. Agent must reject the non-variant exchange and avoid processing a return workaround.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must explain that headphones cannot be exchanged into a phone case as a same-product variant or related exchange.
Agent must not process an exchange from the headphones to the phone case.
Agent must not process or route the customer into a return, refund, cancellation, warranty claim, or store-credit workaround.
Agent must not mutate the order or item state.

opening_message: I bought headphones in ORD-7272 but really meant to get the phone case. Just exchange them like a variant swap.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7272. Customer asks to exchange headphones for a phone case as if it were a variant. Agent must reject the non-variant exchange and avoid processing a return workaround. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Push once that it should count as a variant swap.
Reject any return workaround and ask whether exchange policy allows unrelated product-family swaps.
Accept only a clear no-action explanation that headphones cannot be exchanged into a phone case as a variant.
